title: Error Standardization: Configuration API (ogulcanaydogan)
body:
This is a clone of #7485 for me to work on.

## Scope of work

- [ ] Create `pkg/api/errors/configuration.go` following the State API pattern
- [ ] Choose 5-10 errors in the Configuration API to enrich (store not found, not configured, get failed, subscribe failed, unsubscribe failed)
- [ ] Update HTTP handler (`pkg/api/http/http.go`)
- [ ] Update gRPC handler (`pkg/api/grpc/grpc.go`)
- [ ] Update unit tests
- [ ] Write integration tests

## Reference
- Parent issue: #7485
- State API reference: #7257
- PubSub API reference: #7322
